title: gonolobus rumihuilcanus
intro: Gonolobus rumihuilcanus is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the dogbane or willow family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Gonolobus rumihuilcanus include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of fever, colds, and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Gonolobus rumihuilcanus is often dried and used as a tea or tincture to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
